column.name: Added_Date
column.description: Timestamp when the row was added/loaded into this sales reporting table, used for incremental loads and data freshness checks. Analysts can use it to isolate recent ingestions and detect late-arriving records.

column.name: AdditionalDiscAmt
column.description: Monetary value of any additional discount applied beyond standard/product/scheme discounts. Typically 0.00; interpret as an amount reducing the taxable/chargeable base depending on business rules.

column.name: AdditionalDiscount
column.description: Additional discount value as entered (often a rate or value depending on type). Use together with AdditionalDiscountType to understand whether this is a percentage or flat discount.

column.name: AdditionalDiscountType
column.description: Indicator of how AdditionalDiscount should be interpreted (e.g., 'Percentage' or blank). When blank, additional discount may be absent or stored only as amount in AdditionalDiscAmt.

column.name: BasicAmount
column.description: Line/transaction basic amount before GST, often representing the final taxable base after discounts (context-dependent). Commonly equals TaxableAmountWithOutDisc when discounts are zero.

column.name: BasicRate
column.description: Per-unit base rate used to compute amounts for the SKU/variant. Analysts can multiply BasicRate by quantity (implicit in totals) to reconcile GrossAmount/NetAmount.

column.name: BillNo
column.description: Billing/invoice number from the source system, when available. Can be blank for orders not yet billed or for flows where billing is not captured.

column.name: CGST
column.description: Central GST amount applied to the transaction (in INR). Typically non-zero for intra-state sales and zero when IGST is used.

column.name: CashDisc
column.description: Cash discount amount (e.g., early payment/settlement discount) applied to the transaction. Often 0.00; treat as a separate discount bucket from product/scheme discounts.

column.name: ClaimAmt
column.description: Amount claimed (e.g., scheme claim/credit note claim) associated with the sale. Usually 0.00; useful for profitability/claim reconciliation analyses.

column.name: ClientCity
column.description: City of the purchasing client (customer/outlet/distributor). Use for geographic slicing and territory mapping; may be blank for incomplete masters.

column.name: ClientDivision
column.description: Client’s mapped division in the customer master (can be 'null' string when unmapped). Do not confuse with the sales Division column, which is an organizational/business division.

column.name: ClientGSTNo
column.description: GST registration number of the client, used for compliance and tax reporting. May be blank for unregistered/retail clients or missing master data.

column.name: ClientPinCode
column.description: Postal PIN/ZIP code for the client location. Often blank; use cautiously for geo analysis and consider cleansing.

column.name: ClientRefrence
column.description: Reference identifier for the client from an upstream system (often another client code). Useful for cross-system joins and de-duplication.

column.name: ClientState
column.description: State of the client location, used to determine tax regime (CGST/SGST vs IGST) and regional reporting. Common values are Indian states (e.g., 'Tamil Nadu').

column.name: ClientStatus
column.description: Current status of the client in master data (e.g., 'Active'). Filter to active clients for standard performance reporting unless doing historical master audits.

column.name: ClientTypeGroup
column.description: Higher-level grouping of client type/channel (e.g., 'Secondary', 'P3'). Use for channel segmentation rather than the more granular Client_Type.

column.name: ClientZone
column.description: Geographic zone assigned to the client (e.g., 'South', 'Upper North'). Useful for zonal KPIs and leadership rollups.

column.name: Client_Id
column.description: Unique identifier of the client/customer entity (indexed for performance). Use as the primary key for client-level joins and filtering to avoid full-table scans.

column.name: Client_Name
column.description: Client display/trade name. Suitable for reporting labels; avoid using as a join key due to duplicates/format changes.

column.name: Client_Type
column.description: Specific client type (e.g., 'Retailer', 'Distributor'). Use for channel analysis and pricing/discount policy comparisons.

column.name: Designation
column.description: Role/designation associated with the selling/servicing entity on the transaction (e.g., 'TSI', 'Super Stockist'). Use to analyze performance by role hierarchy.

column.name: DiscountPer
column.description: Discount percentage field (stored as integer/bigint) representing a primary/standard discount rate. Often 0; confirm business definition before using as the only discount metric.

column.name: Division
column.description: Business/sales division for the transaction (indexed), such as 'Retail'. Use as a key slicing dimension and always prefer filtering on it for performance.

column.name: EmpCity
column.description: City associated with the employee/selling entity. Can be blank; use for workforce/coverage analysis when populated.

column.name: EmpName
column.description: Name of the employee or selling entity tied to the transaction. Use for reporting; join on Emp_Id for stable identity.

column.name: EmpState
column.description: State associated with the employee/selling entity. Helpful for salesforce distribution analysis; may be blank.

column.name: EmpZone
column.description: Zone assigned to the employee/selling entity (e.g., 'South', 'Other'). Use for territory rollups; treat 'Other' as a catch-all bucket.

column.name: Emp_Id
column.description: Unique identifier of the employee/sales entity (indexed). Primary key for employee-level performance and hierarchy mapping.

column.name: Function
column.description: Function or code from the source system used for routing/role mapping; often contains IDs or 'null'. Treat as a technical attribute unless business meaning is confirmed.

column.name: GrossAmount
column.description: Gross amount before taxes, commonly the taxable value after discounts (varies by source). Reconcile with NetAmount and TaxableAmountWithOutDisc to validate discount/tax logic.

column.name: HQState
column.description: Headquarter state used for sales hierarchy/territory alignment. Use to group performance by HQ geography rather than client geography.

column.name: IGST
column.description: Integrated GST amount applied to the transaction (in INR). Typically non-zero for inter-state sales and zero when CGST/SGST are used.

column.name: Label
column.description: Transaction/party label code used for internal mapping (e.g., customer label or sales code). Can be blank; interpret as an auxiliary identifier for hierarchy/assignment.

column.name: MarginValue
column.description: Margin or profitability value when provided by the source (often 'null'). Use cautiously and validate calculation rules before using for financial KPIs.

column.name: MonthName
column.description: Text month label derived from the order date (e.g., 'Sep', 'May'). Useful for quick grouping but prefer OrderDate for time intelligence and sorting.

column.name: NetAmount
column.description: Net amount excluding GST, typically the amount after discounts (and possibly after certain adjustments) used as the tax base. Often equals GrossAmount in sample data; validate in broader dataset.

column.name: OrderDate
column.description: Order date (date-only) used for reporting period filters (indexed). Primary date for sales trend analysis and partition-like filtering.

column.name: OrderFinalAmt
column.description: Final order amount including taxes and after discounts, representing the customer payable total. Often matches TotalValue/TotalAmountWithoutDisc when no discounts beyond captured ones.

column.name: Order_Date
column.description: Order timestamp (datetime) capturing the creation/booking time (indexed). Use for intraday analysis and for deduping/sequencing events within the same OrderDate.

column.name: Order_Id
column.description: Unique order identifier (indexed). Use to join to order headers/other fact tables and to de-duplicate at order level.

column.name: PositionCode
column.description: Position/territory code for the responsible sales position (can be 'null'). Useful for mapping to org structures when populated.

column.name: ProductDiscAmt
column.description: Amount of product-level discount applied to the line/transaction. Typically 0.00 in samples; use to separate product promotions from schemes/QPS/other discounts.

column.name: Product_Category
column.description: Category of the product sold (e.g., 'Creme Matte Lipstick'). Use for category performance and assortment analysis.

column.name: Product_Name
column.description: Product name/description (often at SKU level). Use for reporting labels; prefer Variant_Id/VSKUCode for stable product joins.

column.name: QPSDisc
column.description: QPS discount value as stored (often a rate or value depending on QPSDiscountType). Use alongside QPSdiscamt and QPSDiscountType to interpret correctly.

column.name: QPSDiscountType
column.description: Type/units for QPS discount (e.g., 'Percentage' or blank). Determines whether QPSDisc is a rate vs a flat discount indicator.

column.name: QPSdiscamt
column.description: Computed/posted monetary amount of QPS discount applied. Typically 0.00; use for discount bucket reporting because it is already in currency.

column.name: RSMDesignation
column.description: Designation of the Regional Sales Manager in the hierarchy for this transaction (e.g., 'RSM'). Use for leadership-level rollups.

column.name: RSMEmpCode
column.description: Employee code (often alphanumeric/HR code) for the RSM. Useful for cross-referencing HR systems; not necessarily numeric-stable like IDs.

column.name: RSMEmpId
column.description: Identifier for the RSM in the sales hierarchy. Use for joining to employee master/hierarchy tables when available.

column.name: RSMName
column.description: Name of the RSM mapped to the transaction. Use for reporting; rely on RSMEmpId/RSMEmpCode for joins.

column.name: SGST
column.description: State GST amount applied to the transaction (in INR). Typically non-zero for intra-state sales and paired with CGST.

column.name: SchemeLabel
column.description: Identifier/label for the scheme/promotion applied. Often 'null'; use to attribute sales to schemes when populated.

column.name: SchemeStartDate
column.description: Start date/time for the applied scheme or scheme validity reference. Often null; useful for scheme-period compliance and attribution checks.

column.name: SlabSchemeAmt
column.description: Monetary amount of slab-based scheme benefit applied. Typically 0.00; use as a separate promotion bucket from product/QPS discounts.

column.name: SlabSchemePer
column.description: Percentage rate for slab-based scheme when applicable. Often 0.00; interpret alongside SlabSchemeAmt to understand benefit structure.

column.name: SourceCity
column.description: City of the source party in the transaction flow (e.g., supplying distributor/super stockist). Use for supply-chain flow and source geography analysis.

column.name: SourceClientId
column.description: Identifier of the source party (seller) in the transaction flow. Useful for mapping primary-to-secondary flows and sourcing analysis.

column.name: SourceContactType
column.description: Contact type/classification for the source party (may be 'null' or blank). Treat as master-data attribute for segmentation if consistently populated.

column.name: SourceFunction
column.description: Function/code related to the source party from upstream systems (may contain IDs). Treat as technical unless business mapping is documented.

column.name: SourceGSTNo
column.description: GST number of the source party, used for tax compliance and invoice validation. May be blank if not captured.

column.name: SourceName
column.description: Name of the source party (seller) such as distributor/super stockist. Use for reporting; join via SourceClientId for consistency.

column.name: SourcePinCode
column.description: Postal PIN/ZIP of the source party location. Often blank; use cautiously for geo analysis.

column.name: SourceState
column.description: State of the source party, important for determining inter/intra-state tax application. Use to validate whether IGST vs CGST/SGST is expected.

column.name: SourceStatus
column.description: Status of the source party in master data (e.g., 'Active'). Useful for filtering valid trading partners.

column.name: SourceType
column.description: Specific type of the source party (e.g., 'Distributor', 'Super Stockiest'). Use to analyze sales flows by upstream channel level.

column.name: SourceTypeGroup
column.description: Higher-level grouping for source type (e.g., 'Primary', 'Secondary'). Useful for primary vs secondary sales reporting and channel mix.

column.name: SourceZone
column.description: Zone assigned to the source party. Use for upstream network and regional supply analysis.

column.name: TLDesignation
column.description: Designation of the team lead/manager in the hierarchy (e.g., 'ASM', 'BDM'). Use for managerial rollups and span-of-control reporting.

column.name: TLHQ
column.description: Headquarter location/region for the TL. Useful for mapping performance to managerial HQ territories.

column.name: TLLabel
column.description: Label/code for the TL entity used in internal hierarchy systems. Use as an auxiliary hierarchy identifier when Emp codes are inconsistent.

column.name: TLLevel2HQ
column.description: HQ for the next level up (level 2) in the hierarchy. Use for regional rollups above the immediate TL.

column.name: TLLevel2Label
column.description: Label/code for level 2 hierarchy entity (often aligns to RSM/next manager). Useful for hierarchy bridging in reporting.

column.name: TLLevel2Name
column.description: Name of the level 2 manager in the hierarchy. Use for reporting; join via codes/IDs where available.

column.name: TLName
column.description: Name of the immediate team lead/manager mapped to the transaction. Commonly used for manager-level KPIs and territory performance.

column.name: TaxableAmountWithOutDisc
column.description: Taxable amount before applying discounts (despite the name, often represents base before discount deductions). Use to compute effective discount rates by comparing to NetAmount/BasicAmount and discount amounts.

column.name: ToClientEmpDesignation
column.description: Designation of the employee associated with the destination/client side (e.g., the assigned sales rep for the client). Use for client-coverage and accountability reporting.

column.name: ToClientEmpLabel
column.description: Label/code for the destination-side employee. Useful for mapping to internal systems when Emp_Id is not directly provided for the 'To' side.

column.name: ToClientEmpName
column.description: Name of the employee assigned to the destination/client. Use for reporting; avoid as join key.

column.name: ToClientEmpTLDesignation
column.description: Designation of the destination-side employee’s team lead. Use for hierarchy rollups specifically for the client-assignment chain.

column.name: ToClientEmpTLLabel
column.description: Label/code for the destination-side team lead. Useful for hierarchy joins where names/designations may change.

column.name: ToClientEmpTLName
column.description: Name of the destination-side team lead/manager. Use for reporting in client assignment hierarchy contexts.

column.name: ToPositionCode
column.description: Territory/position code for the destination/client assignment (e.g., 'BH_TN_ASM'). Use to map clients to territories and for org-structure reporting.

column.name: TotalAmountWithoutDisc
column.description: Total amount before discounts (often includes GST in samples, so validate definition with finance). Use as a comparison baseline to quantify total discount impact when paired with NetAmount/Taxable amounts.

column.name: TotalGST
column.description: Total GST amount (CGST+SGST+IGST) for the transaction. Use for tax reporting and reconciliation against component tax fields.

column.name: TotalMRPValue
column.description: Total MRP (maximum retail price) value for the quantity sold, representing list-price value. Useful for discount-to-MRP analysis and ASP vs MRP comparisons.

column.name: TotalProductQty
column.description: Total quantity of product units in the transaction line/aggregation. Typically positive integers (e.g., 1, 48) and used for volume KPIs.

column.name: TotalValue
column.description: Total transaction value, typically the final amount including taxes (often equals OrderFinalAmt). Use as the primary sales value metric unless finance defines a different net sales figure.

column.name: VSKUCode
column.description: Variant/SKU code used to identify the product (may sometimes contain a name-like value due to data quality issues). Prefer joining with Variant_Id for consistency and use this as a secondary identifier.

column.name: Variant_Id
column.description: Unique identifier for the product variant (indexed). Use as the primary product key for joins to product masters and for filtering at scale.

column.name: Variant_Name
column.description: Name/descriptor of the variant (e.g., shade/pack). Use for reporting labels and variant-level analysis; join on Variant_Id for stability.

column.name: primarydiscamt
column.description: Amount of primary discount applied (often trade/primary channel discount) in currency. Typically 0.00 in samples; use for discount bucket reporting and profitability calculations.

column.name: secondarydiscamt
column.description: Amount of secondary discount applied (often secondary channel/retailer discount) in currency. Use to distinguish downstream discounting from primary discount structures.
